findings.issue: user-spec.md is not listed in Context Files. It is a mandatory context file per template and task-creator rules.
findings.fix: Add `- [user-spec.md](../user-spec.md)` to the Feature section of Context Files.

findings.issue: user-spec.md is not listed in Context Files. It is a mandatory context file per template and task-creator rules.
findings.fix: Add `- [user-spec.md](../user-spec.md)` to the Feature section of Context Files.

findings.issue: project.md and architecture.md use wrong relative depth: `../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/...`. From `work/phase-3-history/tasks/`, the correct relative path is `../../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/...`. These links will not resolve.
findings.fix: Change all PK references from `../../.claude/...` to `../../../.claude/...` in Context Files.

findings.issue: project.md and architecture.md use wrong relative depth: `../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/...`. From `work/phase-3-history/tasks/`, the correct relative path is `../../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/...`. These links will not resolve.
findings.fix: Change all PK references from `../../.claude/...` to `../../../.claude/...` in Context Files.

findings.issue: TDD Anchor entries are not in the required format `\`tests/path::test_name\` — description`. Instead the section contains prose narrative and compile commands (not test entries). For a code-writing task the format should list actual test methods even if they are compilation-only gates.
findings.fix: Either remove the TDD Anchor section entirely if the task genuinely has no unit-testable logic, or convert the smoke compile checks into the template format. Since this is a UI/design task that cannot be unit-tested, removing the section is acceptable. The current content creates a misleading stub.

findings.issue: Files modified in this task — `gradle/libs.versions.toml` and `app/build.gradle.kts` (Google Fonts dependency) — are not listed in Context Files. The 'What to do' step 10 explicitly adds a dependency there.
findings.fix: Add links to `gradle/libs.versions.toml` and `app/build.gradle.kts` in the Context Files Modify section.

findings.issue: project.md path is `../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/project.md`. From `work/phase-3-history/tasks/`, the correct relative path is `../../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/project.md`. The PK architecture.md uses the same wrong depth.

Required Skills uses an absolute path `C:/Users/Vladimir/.claude/skills/code-writing/SKILL.md` instead of the portable `~/.claude/skills/code-writing/SKILL.md` used in all other tasks. Absolute paths are machine-specific and will break on other machines.

Context Files for PK entries use absolute paths (`C:/AI-WORK/PhoneWrap/.claude/skills/...`) and code files also use absolute paths. All other tasks use relative paths. Absolute paths are machine-specific.
findings.fix: Replace absolute PK paths with `../../../.claude/skills/project-knowledge/references/...` and code file paths with relative paths like `../../../core-settings/src/...`.

findings.issue: Code files listed under 'Code files (читать для понимания контрактов)' are given as raw paths without markdown link format: `app/src/main/kotlin/...` instead of `[FileName.kt](../../../app/src/...)`. Per validation rules, all Context Files entries must be markdown links.
findings.fix: Convert the four DAO/entity raw-path entries to markdown links: e.g. `[ChatDao.kt](../../../app/src/main/kotlin/app/sanctum/machina/data/dao/ChatDao.kt)`.

findings.issue: New files to create are listed as bullet points with raw paths under 'Новые файлы' — not as markdown links. Same rule applies: all file references in Context Files should be markdown links.
findings.fix: Either remove the 'to create' file list (these do not exist yet and cannot be linked) or move it to the Details section where raw paths are acceptable.

findings.issue: Post-completion section is written in English ('Write report to decisions.md', 'If deviated from spec') while all other tasks use Russian. Minor inconsistency.
findings.fix: Translate to Russian to match the language of Tasks 0, 3, 4: 'Записать краткий отчёт в decisions.md', 'Если отклонились от спека — описать отклонение и причину', 'Обновить user-spec/tech-spec если что-то изменилось'.

findings.issue: Tech-spec Task 0 does not define TDD Anchor tests or Verify-smoke — only Verify-user. The task correctly carries the Verify-user forward into the User subsection of Verification Steps. No carry-forward loss detected. (Informational note, not a defect.)

Details section 'Dependencies' mentions `kotlinx-coroutines-test` should be added here or in Task 1, but Task 1's scope is Room foundation only. The coroutines-test dependency is owned by Task 3 per tech-spec context. This creates ambiguity about which task owns the test dependency.
findings.fix: Clarify in Details that `kotlinx-coroutines-test` for androidTest is confirmed present; if not, reference that Task 3 adds it for unit tests. The androidTest version may already exist from Phase 2.
